introSection: Grand Exposition Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster currently operating at Silver Dollar City in Branson, Missouri, USA. It opened in April 2006 as part of a new area called The Grand Exposition.
fullText: Grand Exposition Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster currently operating at Silver Dollar City in Branson, Missouri, USA. It opened in April 2006 as part of a new area called The Grand Exposition.
